tasks.description: Add a proper .gitignore for Swift/SwiftUI macOS project with HID bridge, build artifacts, scraped website data, and macOS system files
tasks.acceptance: File .gitignore exists at repo root, covers .build/, .build-cache/, .dist/, .DS_Store, .tmp-saveweb/, saveweb2zip-com-typ-ing/, typ.ing.har, root-level scraped JS/CSS files, IDE files (.vscode/, .idea/, xcuserdata/), and .swarm/session/

tasks.description: Create Utilities/String+Safe.swift with a single deduplicated safeText() function handling control characters, private-use codepoints, and Unicode variation selectors without stripping legitimate symbols/brackets
tasks.acceptance: String+Safe.swift exists in Utilities/, contains one public safeText() function used by both OverlayRootView and KeycapCard, duplicate implementations removed, handles [ ] / {} / () brackets without corruption, strips only control chars (U+0000-U+001F, U+007F-U+009F) and FE0F variation selector

tasks.description: Extract KeycapCard (lines 163-369) and StripedFill (lines 376-392) from OverlayRootView.swift into Views/KeycapCard.swift and Views/StripedFill.swift
tasks.acceptance: KeycapCard.swift and StripedFill.swift exist in Views/, OverlayRootView.swift imports and uses them without code duplication, no rendering regression

tasks.description: Organize Sources/ into subdirectories — create DataSources/, Views/, Models/, Utilities/, Layouts/ directories and move files: DataSources (KeyboardDataSource, MockKeyboardDataSource, ZSAHIDDataSource, OryxHARDataSource, KeymappProbeDataSource), Views (OverlayRootView), Models (Models), Layouts (empty, for task 2.4). Root files stay: AppMain, AppDelegate, OverlayAppController, OverlayViewModel. Create git checkpoint before starting.
tasks.acceptance: All 11 source files in correct subdirectories, Package.swift paths updated to reflect new structure, swift build succeeds, all imports resolve correctly

tasks.description: Extract keySpecs array (lines 151-227) and layout constants (keyWidth, keyHeight, gap, rect helper) from Models.swift into Layouts/VoyagerLayout.swift with a VoyagerLayout enum containing static properties
tasks.acceptance: VoyagerLayout.swift exists in Layouts/ with keySpecs, keyWidth, keyHeight, gap constants, and rect function. Models.swift imports and uses VoyagerLayout.keySpecs. No layout values changed. swift build succeeds.

tasks.description: Add ErrorState enum (none, warning, error) and error callback to KeyboardDataSource protocol. Update OverlayViewModel to aggregate errors from all data sources and expose them to the UI. Update ZSAHIDDataSource to report hidapi errors through the callback.
tasks.acceptance: KeyboardDataSource protocol has onError callback. ZSAHIDDataSource reports bridge failures through it. OverlayViewModel collects errors and exposes activeErrors array. OverlayRootView renders error banner when errors present. Mock data source never triggers errors. swift build succeeds.

tasks.description: Visual design pass: extract design tokens (font sizes, spacings, radii, durations) into Layouts/DesignTokens.swift. Refine chrome fade animation timing. Ensure all keycap positions respect 6px gap consistently. Add OpacityModifier enum for consistent transparency values.
tasks.acceptance: DesignTokens.swift exists with fontSize, spacing, radius, animation duration constants. All views reference tokens instead of hardcoded values. Chrome fade uses smooth interruptible animation. Layer changes have visual transition feedback. swift build succeeds.

tasks.description: Add Makefile at repo root with .PHONY build, run, clean, install, lint targets wrapping swift build/run/swiftlint. Add .swiftlint.yml with basic config (opt_in_rules: empty_string, redundant_nil_coalescing). make lint runs swiftlint --quiet or prints skip message if swiftlint not installed.
tasks.acceptance: Makefile exists at repo root with 5 .PHONY targets. make build runs swift build. make run runs swift run. make clean removes .build/. make install copies binary to /usr/local/bin. make lint runs swiftlint or prints 'swiftlint not installed, skipping'.

tasks.description: Add NSStatusItem menu bar icon using SF Symbol 'keyboard' with Show/Hide Overlay, Restart, and Quit menu items. Create MenuBarController managing status item lifecycle. Change applicationShouldTerminateAfterLastWindowClosed to false so hiding window does not kill app. Wire Show/Hide to toggle window visibility. Wire Quit to NSApp.terminate. Wire Restart to call OverlayAppController.restart().
tasks.acceptance: Status bar item with keyboard icon visible near battery. Menu has Show/Hide Overlay (toggles with checkmark), Restart (cancels/reinits data sources), Quit (terminates). Hiding overlay window does not quit app. App visible only in menu bar, no dock icon.

tasks.description: Create git checkpoint. Add stored Task? handle to OverlayAppController for cancellation. Add restart() that cancels active Task, reinitializes data sources, clears errors, and starts fresh. Add reset() to OverlayViewModel clearing capture, pressedKeyIndices, activeErrors, restoring fallback status. Add hideWindow() to OverlayWindowController calling orderOut(nil).
tasks.acceptance: OverlayAppController has private var dataTask for cancellation. restart() cancels dataTask, recreates data sources, calls model.reset(), starts new dataTask. ViewModel.reset() clears capture, pressedKeyIndices, activeErrors, sets statusText=Ready. OverlayWindowController.hideWindow() hides window. swift build succeeds.
